name_cn:
Top-tier factory with full packaging
The new D-Joy makes a strong comeback with a viral rhythm 🔥. The bag comes with two shoulder straps and multiple carrying styles 🙋🏻‍♀️. Stylish and chic, featuring unique diamond quilting lambskin paired with matte hardware. Absolutely a cool girl's exclusive bag 🖤
size: 26*6*14cm
